data.body:
CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓

AC verification:
- AC1 (run-all.sh): hook test file runs; pre-existing failures in other suites unrelated to changes
- AC2 (tier downgrade RED): CONFIRMED — test_tier_downgrade_rejected FAIL against current code
- AC3 (behavioral tests): all 5 new test scenarios invoke record-review.sh with crafted inputs, assert exit code + stderr

6 new assertions fail (RED):
  - test_tier_downgrade_rejected: exits non-zero (current code exits 0)
  - test_tier_downgrade_rejected: stderr mentions downgrade (no message)
  - test_tier_missing_telemetry_fail_open: stderr warns (no WARN)
  - test_tier_missing_telemetry_fail_open: tier_verified=false (not written)
  - test_tier_missing_review_tier_fail_open: stderr warns (no WARN)
  - test_tier_missing_review_tier_fail_open: tier_verified=false (not written)

8 existing tests still pass. 2 new tier tests (match_accepted, upgrade_accepted) pass since current code doesn't reject anything.
